title: IMMZ.D5.DT.Mumps.CI ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZ.D5.DT.Mumps.CI ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

tchatvc-44.60.en: The client has allergy to vaccine components

mvcbccjir-75.23.en: Mumps vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required.
